text_block_list.name: Photo Shoot Staff
text_block_list.text: Whoa, are you okay? Are you feeling sick?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
No, it's nothing! Sorry... Here, this is the pose you
wanted.

text_block_list.name: Photo Shoot Staff
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, it doesn't look like you can keep going.
Let's take a break!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
(I should tell them I'm just choking on a boba, but
then I'd look so stupid!)
